summary: Ground-stage matching PR touching F-Zero car and Pokemon Stadium code. It renamed two stadium render callback symbols from fn_ address-style names to grStadium_ names, updated header and symbols metadata, matched grStadium_801D2FD0, improved grStadium_801D4548 and grFZeroCar_801CAFBC, and refactored F-Zero car code toward typed/model-desc access and helper-based scale handling.

key_files.role: Refactored grFZeroCar_801CAFBC and setup_car_child: added sc/types.h and baselib/gobj.h includes, used DynamicModelDesc fields for animation pointers, replaced gobj->hsd_obj with GET_JOBJ, removed PAD_STACK, introduced multiplyScale helper, and changed table/data iteration to indexed access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grFZeroCar_801CAFBC removes PAD_STACK and uses GET_JOBJ
raw_diff: adds multiplyScale helper and indexed grFZeroCar_803E0BD8[i] access

key_files.role: Updated stadium callbacks and matching shape: renamed fn_801D2FD0/fn_801D3084 to grStadium_* at call sites and definitions, rearranged grStadium_801D2FD0 control flow and locals, added baselib/forward.h, and replaced an inline dontinline wrapper with a scoped dont_inline pragma around grStadium_801D42B8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: GObj_SetupGXLinkMax now uses grStadium_801D2FD0 and grStadium_801D3084
raw_diff: grStadium_801D2FD0 renamed and rewritten with if (!wrapper->flag)
raw_diff: grStadium_801D42B8 wrapped in #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop
raw_diff: grStadium_801D4548 now calls grStadium_801D42B8 directly
text_corpus issue_comment: grStadium_801D2FD0 new match, grStadium_801D4548 improved

key_files.role: Header prototypes updated for the two renamed stadium functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: prototypes changed from fn_801D2FD0/fn_801D3084 to grStadium_801D2FD0/grStadium_801D3084

key_files.role: Symbol metadata updated to rename .text symbols at 0x801D2FD0 and 0x801D3084 from fn_ names to grStadium_ names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_801D2FD0 and fn_801D3084 symbol entries renamed to grStadium_801D2FD0 and grStadium_801D3084

what_changed.text: Renamed two Pokemon Stadium functions at 0x801D2FD0 and 0x801D3084 from fn_801D2FD0/fn_801D3084 to grStadium_801D2FD0/grStadium_801D3084 across symbols, header prototypes, definitions, and GObj_SetupGXLinkMax call sites.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/gr/grpstadium.c call-site and definition rename hunks

what_changed.text: Matched grStadium_801D2FD0 according to the bot report, with the unit main/melee/gr/grpstadium moving that item from 95.73% to 100.00%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment decomp-dev[bot]: ✅ 1 new match grStadium_801D2FD0

what_changed.text: Improved grStadium_801D4548 and grFZeroCar_801CAFBC according to the bot report.
In grfzerocar, replaced raw byte-offset animation pointer extraction with a DynamicModelDesc cast and field access through entry->anims and entry->matanims.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: setup_car_child replaces u8* entry plus entry+4/entry+8 loads with DynamicModelDesc* and fields

what_changed.text: In grfzerocar, removed a PAD_STACK call and used GET_JOBJ(gobj) for the root JObj access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: root = GET_JOBJ(gobj) replaces root = gobj->hsd_obj

what_changed.text: In grpstadium, replaced a separate grStadium_801D42B8_dontinline wrapper with scoped MWCC pragma controls around grStadium_801D42B8 and direct calls to that function.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: adds #pragma push, #pragma dont_inline on, #pragma pop around grStadium_801D42B8

smart_moves.text: Kept symbol renames consistent across symbols.txt, the owning header, function definitions, and call sites.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/gr/grpstadium.c call-site and definition rename hunks

smart_moves.text: Recovered a typed DynamicModelDesc access pattern instead of continuing raw pointer arithmetic for archive model animation data.
Pulled repeated JObj scale multiplication into a small helper, reducing a local generated-looking block in grFZeroCar_801CAFBC.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: replaces local Vec3 scale block with multiplyScale(tra_jobj, ground_scale)

smart_moves.text: Scoped the dont_inline pragma with push/pop rather than leaving an unbounded pragma region.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: #pragma push before #pragma dont_inline on and #pragma pop after grStadium_801D42B8

decomp_lessons.lesson: When struct types are available, replacing byte-offset loads with typed descriptor fields can improve both readability and matching progress.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: setup_car_child replaces u8* offset loads with DynamicModelDesc* entry and entry->anims/entry->matanims

decomp_lessons.lesson: For callback symbols that are no longer anonymous, update all surfaces together: symbols.txt, header prototypes, definitions, and call sites.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: definitions and GObj_SetupGXLinkMax call sites renamed in grpstadium.c

decomp_lessons.lesson: A narrowly scoped dont_inline pragma can replace a throwaway wrapper function when the diff evidence shows the wrapper was only used to steer inlining shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: adds scoped #pragma dont_inline on around grStadium_801D42B8
raw_diff: direct call to grStadium_801D42B8 in grStadium_801D4548

naming_conventions.convention: Pokemon Stadium functions in grpstadium use the grStadium_801Dxxxx address-style prefix once promoted from anonymous fn_ names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: surrounding symbols include grStadium_801D2BEC, grStadium_801D2D78, grStadium_801D2E24, grStadium_801D3138

naming_conventions.convention: Small local helper added in grfzerocar used lower camel case multiplyScale rather than address-style naming.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline void multiplyScale(HSD_JObj* jobj, f32 scale)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use typed descriptor field access to influence code shape while removing raw offset loads.
Convert pointer-increment loop state into explicit indexed accesses for data_ptr[i] and grFZeroCar_803E0BD8[i].children[n].
evidence_refs: raw_diff: for loop changes from i++, data_ptr++, tbl++ to i++

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Remove a PAD_STACK steering tactic after refactoring grFZeroCar_801CAFBC.
Use a tightly scoped #pragma dont_inline on a function to replace an inline wrapper used at a call site.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop around grStadium_801D42B8

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: GALE01 report showed +180 matched-code bytes, one new match grStadium_801D2FD0, and two unmatched item improvements: grStadium_801D4548 and grFZeroCar_801CAFBC.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR 2354 title, author, state, timestamps, changed files
raw_diff: complete diff, original_chars 10977, truncated false
changed_files.jsonl: four changed files with line counts
text_corpus.jsonl: empty PR body and one decomp-dev bot report
notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice, so reviewer intent and author rationale are not available.
Bot report provides matching-score evidence for one new match and two improvements, but no local build command, objdiff details, or adjacent-regression evidence are included.
The pragma dont_inline tactic is visible in the diff and correlated with a reported improvement, but the slice does not prove it was required or that adjacent functions were checked.
Function renames are directly evidenced by symbols/header/source diffs, but semantic meaning beyond the grStadium subsystem prefix is not proven.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed descriptor fields can replace raw archive-entry pointer arithmetic
accepted_candidate_records.text: In setup_car_child, PR 2354 replaced raw byte offsets into archive->unk4->unk8 with a DynamicModelDesc* and entry->anims/entry->matanims field access; the bot report also showed grFZeroCar_801CAFBC improving from 98.74% to 99.89%.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Scoped dont_inline pragma can replace a one-off dontinline wrapper
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2354 removed grStadium_801D42B8_dontinline, wrapped grStadium_801D42B8 with #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop, and changed grStadium_801D4548 to call grStadium_801D42B8 directly. Treat as a narrow tactic candidate, not a general style rule.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: pragma wrapper replacement around grStadium_801D42B8

source_update_candidates.title: grpstadium callback symbols promoted from fn_ to grStadium_ names
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2354 renamed the functions at .text:0x801D2FD0 and .text:0x801D3084 from fn_801D2FD0/fn_801D3084 to grStadium_801D2FD0/grStadium_801D3084 in symbols.txt, grpstadium.h, definitions, and call sites.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grpstadium.c call-site and definition rename hunks
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path/symbol fact for future searches, but curation should verify current symbol names before adding to source-owned path facts.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all grpstadium fn_ symbols should be renamed; the PR only changed two specific symbols.
Do not promote #pragma dont_inline as normal decomp style from this PR alone; evidence supports only a narrow, scoped tactic in this file.
Do not claim a full match for grFZeroCar_801CAFBC or grStadium_801D4548; the bot report lists them as improvements, not new matches.
Do not claim human review approval details; the loaded slice has no human review comments.
